title: 4smile Over Door Hook Set of 10 - Holds 8KG - White Coat Hooks for Leaf Depth 3.6 cm (1.4") + 4.6 cm (1.8") Sturdy Hangers for Clothes, Wreath Hanger
features: Practical set of 10 – Over door hook white hooks as space-saving organizers. The no-drill, sturdy over door hooks are ideal as over door coat hooks in the hallway.
Always handy – The door hook fits all doors with a leaf depth of 3.6 cm (1.4") and 4.6 cm (1.8"), due to the two rebate depths on both sides.
Individual use – The back of door hooks can be used individually; over door hooks are ideal for hanging clothes in bedrooms, towels in bathrooms, for decoration in sitting rooms and much more.
Absolutely sturdy – Because they are rustproof and sturdy, the over the door hook are perfect for hanging towels in bathrooms.
Scratch-free mounting – The over door hooks for bedroomsfor the inside or outside of doors are equipped with felt pads to protect surfaces.
description: Product Description Door depth 3.6cm (1.4") & 4.6cm (1.8") 4smile Over door hanger - Set of 10, White The stainless steel, space-saving over door hooks are versatile organizers for the entire home. No-drill, sturdy door hooks are ideal for hanging clothes and accessories; load capacity 8 kg (18 lbs) each hook. They can be used individually. Included felt pads protect surface of the door. Previous page Versatile organizers Ten practical door hangers The no-drill, space-saving door hanging hooks are useful organizers throughout the home. Two rebate depths Fit two UK standard doors The coat hooks over doors fit all doors with a leaf depth of 3.6 cm (1.4") and 4.6 cm (1.8"). Effortless tidiness Applicable everywhere The back of door hooks can be used individually; ideal for hanging clothes, towels or accessories. Solid quality Load capacity ≥ 8 kg (18 lbs) per hook As the door coat hooks are 100% rustproof, they can readily be used as over door hooks for bathroom. Felt Pad Surface protection Surfaces are protected by the felt pad provided. Next page 1 Set of 10 2 Always handy 3 Individual use 4 Absolutely sturdy 5 Simple, no-drill mounting Where can door hangers be used? Coat hooks over doors are a space-saving addition to the cloakroom. They provide additional hanging options for clothes and accessories and thus create extra storage space. The door hanging hooks are useful organizers throughout the home. Will the over door hanger fit to my door? These over door hooks with two rebate depths on both sides can be used for standard UK door leaf depth of 3.6 cm (1.4") and 4.6 cm (1.8"). How much load can the door hanger hooks be subjected to? The door hangers have a load capacity of up to 8 kg (18 lbs) per hook and are thus suitable for coats, bags, bath towels, bathrobes and more. What about quality? The door hangers have a high-quality appearance. They are robust and 100% rustproof. Will the door hanger damage the surface of my door? Included felt pads protect the surface.
